file_insights.changes: Created comprehensive serializer module with 1224 lines
key_components: Minimal serializers for nested representations (Theme, Menu, Category, Product, Allergen)
Theme serializers (List, Detail, Create, Update)
Menu serializers (List, Detail, Create, Update)
Category serializers (List, Detail, Create, Update)
Product serializers (List, Detail, Create, Update)
ProductVariant and ProductModifier serializers
Allergen and NutritionInfo serializers
Cross-tenant reference validation
Multi-tenancy support via TenantModelSerializer
patterns: Consistent serializer pattern: List -> Detail -> Create -> Update
Custom validation methods for slug uniqueness and cross-tenant refs
Help text annotations on all fields using gettext_lazy

file_insights.changes: Created viewsets with full CRUD operations
key_components: ThemeViewSet with list, create, retrieve, update, destroy, set_default actions
MenuViewSet with similar action structure
CategoryViewSet with nested filtering
ProductViewSet with variant and modifier management
Custom actions for state management (set_default, publish, unpublish)
QuerySet optimization with select_related and prefetch_related
Soft delete handling across all viewsets
patterns: Dynamic serializer selection based on action (list vs detail vs create/update)
Filter and ordering support via rest_framework_filters
Standard pagination with custom page sizes

key_components: SimpleRouter for automatic CRUD route generation
Nested routes for ProductVariant and ProductModifier under Product
Namespace configuration for reverse URL lookups
RESTful routing patterns with UUID primary keys
Added django-filter for advanced filtering support
Maintained DRF and Django versions for API framework

patterns_discovered.description: Consistent use of TenantModelSerializer and organization context injection across all serializers
patterns_discovered.benefit: Ensures data isolation between organizations and prevents cross-tenant data leakage

patterns_discovered.description: Four-tier serializer approach: Minimal -> List -> Detail -> (Create/Update)
locations: serializers.py - Theme, Menu, Category, Product serializers
patterns_discovered.benefit: Optimized response payloads for different API use cases with proper field inclusion

patterns_discovered.description: ViewSets use get_serializer_class() to return appropriate serializer based on action
patterns_discovered.benefit: Single viewset handles multiple serialization strategies without code duplication

patterns_discovered.description: Custom validate_* methods for field-level and cross-field validation with i18n support
patterns_discovered.benefit: Clear separation of validation logic and localized error messages

patterns_discovered.description: SimpleRouter configured with explicit nested resources for variants and modifiers
patterns_discovered.benefit: RESTful hierarchy reflected in URL structure and automatic parent filtering

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: Theme ID validation requires organization context
gotchas_discovered.description: Theme validation in MenuCreateSerializer.validate_theme_id() depends on request.organization being available in context
gotchas_discovered.impact: Will fail silently or return incorrect data if request context is missing organization attribute
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Ensure TenantMiddleware sets request.organization before serializer validation

gotchas_discovered.description: Some queries use deleted_at__isnull=True filter explicitly while relying on managers for others
gotchas_discovered.impact: Potential for accidentally including soft-deleted records if custom manager not used consistently
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Use SoftDeleteQuerySet or ensure all queries use deleted_at filtering

gotchas_discovered.description: Slug validation happens during serializer validation but concurrent requests could bypass uniqueness constraint
gotchas_discovered.impact: Race condition possible between validation and database insert in high-concurrency scenarios
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Database-level unique constraint combined with serializer validation provides defense-in-depth

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: Missing queryset optimization for nested counts
gotchas_discovered.description: SerializerMethodField calls like get_category_count() execute separate queries per object
gotchas_discovered.impact: N+1 query problem for list endpoints with many themes/menus
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Use annotate() in viewset QuerySet to precompute counts with Count() aggregation

approach_outcome.summary: Successfully created comprehensive menu module API with full serializers, viewsets, and URL routing
accomplishments: Implemented 30+ serializer classes covering all menu domain models
Created viewsets with custom actions for state management (publish, set_default)
Established URL routing with nested resources for variants and modifiers
Integrated multi-tenancy enforcement across all API endpoints
Added proper validation, filtering, and pagination support
Documented API response formats and critical rules in module docstring

recommendations.recommendation: Add queryset optimization for computed fields
recommendations.details: Replace SerializerMethodField.get_*() calls with annotated counts using Django ORM aggregation to eliminate N+1 queries on list endpoints

recommendations.recommendation: Create comprehensive test suite for serializers and viewsets
recommendations.details: Add tests for validation logic, multi-tenancy enforcement, soft delete handling, and API response formats
Generate API documentation using drf-spectacular or similar tool to document request/response schemas for frontend consumption

recommendations.recommendation: Extract common validation patterns to base serializer mixins
recommendations.details: Create reusable mixin for slug validation logic that's repeated across Theme, Menu, and Category serializers
Implement bulk_create, bulk_update endpoints for products and categories to support efficient batch operations
